Strategic Advisory

Security Operations
Consulting

Building effective security operations requires more than technology. Our practice provides strategic consulting on SOC design, staffing models, process engineering, and metrics frameworks — grounded in Fortune 50 operational leadership experience.

Operational Excellence by Design

Security operations programs fail when they are built around products rather than process. Our consulting practice addresses the foundational elements that determine SOC effectiveness: organizational structure, analyst workflow, detection strategy, escalation procedures, and performance measurement.

Whether your organization is establishing its first SOC, restructuring an underperforming program, or preparing to outsource security monitoring — we provide the strategic framework and operational expertise to ensure the investment delivers measurable security outcomes.

Capabilities

  • SOC organizational design and staffing model development
  • Operational maturity assessment and improvement roadmap
  • Analyst workflow optimization and tier structure redesign
  • Incident escalation and communication procedure development
  • SOC technology stack evaluation and selection advisory
  • Security metrics and KPI framework implementation
  • Runbook and standard operating procedure development
  • SOC build vs. outsource analysis and vendor evaluation
  • Shift scheduling, coverage modeling, and retention strategies

Who We Serve

CISOs and security directors responsible for building or improving security operations. Organizations evaluating whether to build an in-house SOC or engage an MSSP. Companies preparing to restructure security teams for improved efficiency. Board members and executives seeking independent assessment of security operations effectiveness.

Consulting Areas

  • SOC Design & Build
  • Staffing Strategy
  • Process Engineering
  • Metrics & KPIs
  • Vendor Evaluation
  • Maturity Assessment

Assess Your SOC

Request a SOC maturity assessment to identify improvement priorities.
